metadata.title: Image Converter
metadata.description: Convert, compress and resize images from one format to another by dragging and dropping or pasting into the note.

regex.source: Notice("Error: No format selected for conversion.")
Notice("Original file kept without any compression.")

regex.target: name:"处理当前笔记中的所有图片"

regex.target: text:"请备份您的图片，这将调整您的原始图片大小。"

regex.target: text:"只调整宽度时，可以将高度输入框留空。"

regex.source: .setName("Resize by dragging edge of an image")
regex.target: .setName("通过拖动图像边缘调整大小")
.setName("使用 Shift + 鼠标滚轮进行调整大小")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn this on to allow image conversion and compression on drag'n'drop or paste. "Same as original" - will keep original file format.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`启用此选项以允许在拖放或粘贴时进行图片转换和压缩。选择“与原始文件相同”将保留原始文件格式。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("0 - low quality, 99 - high quality, 100 - no compression; 75 - recommended")
regex.target: .setDesc("0 - 低质量，99 - 高质量，100 - 无压缩；75 - 推荐")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the mode to use when resizing the image. Resizing an image will further reduce file-size, but it will resize your actual file, which means that the original file will be modified, and the changes will be permanent.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择调整图像大小时要使用的模式。调整图像大小将进一步减小文件大小，但它将调整您的实际文件，这意味着原始文件将被修改，更改将是永久性的。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Automatically rename dropped image into current notes name + todays date (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS). For instance, image "testImage.jpg" dropped into note "Howtotakenotes.md" becomes "Howtotakenotes-20230927164411.webp"')
regex.target: .setDesc('自动将拖放的图像重命名为当前笔记名称 + 今天的日期（YYYYMMDDHHMMSS）。例如，将图像“testImage.jpg”拖放到笔记“Howtotakenotes.md”中，该图像将被重命名为“Howtotakenotes-20230927164411.webp”。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If you specify folder path as "/attachments/images" then all processed images will be saved inside "/attachments/images/" folder. If any of the folders do not exist, they will be created.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果您将文件夹路径指定为"/attachments/images"，那么所有处理过的图片将保存在"/attachments/images/"文件夹中。如果其中任何文件夹不存在，它们都将被创建。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Select where to save converted images. Default - follow rules as defined by Obsidian in 'File & Links' > 'Default location for new attachments'")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择要保存转换后的图片的位置。默认情况下，遵循 Obsidian 在“文件和链接” > “新附件的默认位置” 中定义的规则。")
.setDesc('自动应用 "|size" 到拖放/粘贴的图片。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Specify the default size which should be applied on all dropped/pasted images. For example, if you specify custom size as "250" then when you drop or paste an "image.jpg" it would become ![[image.jpg|250]]')
regex.target: .setDesc('指定应用于所有拖放/粘贴图像的默认大小。例如，如果您指定自定义大小为“250”，那么当您拖放或粘贴一个“image.jpg”时，它将变成 ![[image.jpg|250]]')

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn this on to allow resizing images by dragging the edge of an image.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此功能以允许通过拖动图像边缘来调整图像大小。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle this setting to allow resizing images using the Shift key combined with the scroll wheel.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换此设置以允许使用 Shift 键和滚动轮调整图片大小。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle to enable or disable right-click context menu")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换以启用或禁用右键上下文菜单")

regex.source: .setDesc('"Same as original" - will keep original file format.')
regex.target: .setDesc('与原始文件相同 - 将保持原始文件格式。')
.setPlaceholder("以像素为单位输入所需的长度")
.setTitle("处理当前笔记中的所有图片")
.setTitle("复制为 Base64 编码的图片")

regex.source: textContent='Below settings allow you to adjust image dimensions using the standard ObsidianMD method by modifying image links. For instance, to change the width of ![[Engelbart.jpg]], we add "| 100" at the end, resulting in ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]].'
regex.target: textContent='以下设置允许您使用标准的 ObsidianMD 方法，通过修改图片链接来调整图片尺寸。例如，要改变 ![[Engelbart.jpg]] 的宽度，我们可以在末尾添加"| 100"，这样就可以得到 ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]] 的结果。'

regex.source: Notice("No images found in the vault.")
regex.target: Notice("在库中找不到任何图片。")
